name: White Chocolate Cheesecake-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix the cookie crumbs and melted butter in a bowl. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake for 10 minutes.
4. In another bowl, beat together cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in the melted white chocolate.
5. Pour filling over crust.
6. Bake for 35 minutes. Turn off oven and allow to cool completely in the pan with at least an hour of cooling time (preferably overnight).
7. Loosen cake from rim of pan and continue cooling before refrigerating for at least 2 hours, or ideally overnight.
8. Garnish with dollops of whipped cream and sprinkling of crushed chocolate cookies.
